description: Final-validation basic-call case for the loadgen×e2e fusion: pooled per-call identities (From/To walk a binding pool with ${seq:N}/${rand:N} expansion), per-call dwell overrides (ring 25 ms, talk 10 ms), a referenced Check set (loadgen-invite-identity) plus an inline check, and an allowViolations waiver. Drive it against the dev_sut playground with `--correlate to-user`. Every field it asserts survives any SIP-correct B2BUA and does NOT touch the To URI (To-user correlation rewrites the To user-part with the per-call token).
